nodes.name: Find Open Pulls By Signer Email

parameters.name: operations
parameters.value: ={"query":"mutation UploadContractFile($file: Upload!, $fieldMetadataId: String!) { uploadFilesFieldFile(file: $file, fieldMetadataId: $fieldMetadataId) { id } }","variables":{"file":null,"fieldMetadataId":"{{ $env.DOCUSIGN_PULL_SIGNED_CONTRACT_FIELD_ID }}"}}

parameters.subject: =DocuSign contract could not be auto-matched
=DocuSign contract PDF download failed
=DocuSign contract processing failed

parameters.content:
## AUTO-12

Triggered by DocuSign Connect on envelope completion. Register this workflow's Production Webhook URL as a DocuSign Connect configuration (Admin → Connect → Add Configuration), event: Envelope Completed.

Reps still send contracts manually via the DocuSign website — this workflow only handles the completion side.

Matches signer email to open Pulls (VISITED/OUT/DUE_SOON/OVERDUE). Exactly one match → auto-attach PDF to Pull.signedContract + Person.contracts and set Pull.contractSigned. Zero or multiple matches → email OWNER_EMAIL for manual resolution.

HMAC verification uses DocuSign's standard documented Connect scheme (X-DocuSign-Signature-1, HMAC-SHA256/base64 over raw body) — not yet verified against a live DocuSign account's actual payload; revisit if real Connect payloads differ.

All Twenty/DocuSign HTTP nodes after signature verification use onError: continueErrorOutput, routed to "Notify Team - Processing Failed" so no failure is silent. The 200 ack to DocuSign fires immediately after signature verification (before processing completes) since DocuSign expects a fast response — processing failures are caught and reported via email instead of via the HTTP response.

Requires env vars: DOCUSIGN_API_KEY, DOCUSIGN_ACCOUNT_ID, DOCUSIGN_BASE_URL, DOCUSIGN_WEBHOOK_SECRET, DOCUSIGN_PULL_SIGNED_CONTRACT_FIELD_ID (Pull.signedContract field metadata ID from Twenty, needed for the multipart file upload — fetch once via the metadata API after running create-docusign-fields.py).

main.node: Find Open Pulls By Signer Email
